title: Detailed information for Blackspark Corp. - Canada.ca
content:
## Detailed information for Blackspark Corp.
Product name: Armada
Certified for the 2025 tax year: Yes Certified for prior years 2021, 2022, 2023 and 2024: Yes
Address: 140 Yonge Street, Suite 200, Toronto, ON, M5C 1X6 Contact: Charles Baptiste Email: info@blacksparkcorp.com
Telephone: 1-855-667-7275
This software does not support diacritics.
Exclusions for the 2025 tax year.
- T1134, Information Return Relating to Controlled and Non-Controlled Foreign Affiliates
- T1135, Foreign Income Verification Statement
- Electronic transmission of Pre-authorized debit (PAD)
- Electronic transmission of Form T217 Election, or Revocation of an Election, to use the Mark-to-Market method
- Electronic transmission of Form T2057 Election on Disposition of Property by a Taxpayer to a Taxable Canadian Corporation
- Electronic transmission of Form T2059 Election on Disposition of Property by a Taxpayer to a Canadian Partnership
- Submit Documents web service for T217, T2057, and T2059 attachments
- Ontario returns only
- Form T691, Alternative Minimum Tax
- Form T2203, Provincial and Territorial Taxes – Multiple Jurisdictions
- Form T2038, IND Investment Tax Credit
- Form T2222, Northern Residents Deductions
- Form RC381, Interprovincial Calculation for CP and QPP Contributions and Overpayment
- Form T1273 Statement A – Harmonized AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Information and Statement of Farming Activities for Individuals
- T1255, Designation of a Property as a Principal Residence by the Legal Representative of a Deceased Individual
- T2121 Statement of Fishing Activities
- T2042 Statement of Farming Activities
- T1163 Statement A – AgriStability and AgriInvest Programs Information and Statement of Farming Activities for Individuals
- Limited or non-active partnership (T5013), including tax shelters
- Non capital losses of other years
- Canadian Indian fields
- Ontario minimum tax carryover
- Pre-bankruptcy returns
- Form RC71, Statement of Discounting Transactions
- Non-Resident Status Returns - Disposition of Taxable Canadian Property by Non-Residents of Canada (Section 116), Deemed Resident, Emigrant

Note: This software does not support the calculation/production of the T1 Provincial Québec return . For the list of software authorized by Revenu Québec for use by professional tax preparers in filing the personal income tax return TP-1 , please visit the Revenu Québec website .
*Disclaimer Please note that this information was provided by the software developer. If you find any discrepancies in the information provided, please contact the software developer directly. The links are provided for your convenience and are to be used at your own discretion.
